name: Barbell Bench Press
description: Lie on a flat bench, grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower to chest and press up.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
description: Press dumbbells upward on an incline bench set to 30-45 degrees.

name: Dumbbell Fly
description: Lie flat, extend arms with dumbbells above chest, lower in a wide arc, then bring back together.

name: Push-Up
description: Standard push-up from the floor. Keep body straight, lower chest to ground and push back up.

name: Cable Crossover
description: Stand between cable machines, pull handles together in front of chest in a hugging motion.

name: Barbell Back Squat
description: Bar on upper back, squat down until thighs are parallel to the floor, then stand up.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Hold barbell with straight arms, hinge at hips keeping legs slightly bent, lower bar along legs.

name: Leg Press
description: Sit in the leg press machine, push the platform away by extending knees and hips.

name: Leg Curl
description: Lie face down on the machine, curl the weight toward your glutes by bending your knees.

name: Leg Extension
description: Sit on the machine, extend your legs until straight, squeezing the quads at the top.

name: Walking Lunge
description: Step forward into a lunge, alternating legs as you walk forward.

name: Calf Raise
description: Stand on the edge of a step, raise heels as high as possible, lower and repeat.

name: Pull-Up
description: Hang from a bar with overhand grip, pull yourself up until chin clears the bar.

name: Barbell Row
description: Bend over with flat back, pull barbell to lower chest/upper abdomen.

name: Seated Cable Row
description: Sit at a cable row station, pull the handle toward your torso, squeezing shoulder blades.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Sit at a lat pulldown machine, pull the bar down to upper chest.

name: Dumbbell Row
description: One arm on bench for support, row a dumbbell to your hip with the other arm.

name: Deadlift
description: Stand over barbell, grip it, and lift by extending hips and knees simultaneously.

name: Overhead Press
description: Press barbell from shoulder height to overhead, fully extending arms.

name: Lateral Raise
description: Hold dumbbells at sides, raise arms out to the sides until parallel with the floor.

name: Face Pull
description: Pull a rope attachment on a cable machine toward your face, flaring elbows out.

name: Rear Delt Fly
description: Bend over or use a machine, raise arms out to the sides targeting rear delts.

name: Barbell Curl
description: Stand holding a barbell with underhand grip, curl it up to shoulder height.

name: Dumbbell Hammer Curl
description: Curl dumbbells with a neutral (palms facing each other) grip.

name: Tricep Pushdown
description: Push a cable attachment down by extending elbows, keeping upper arms at your sides.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
description: Hold a dumbbell overhead with both hands, lower behind head by bending elbows, then extend.

name: Dips
description: Support yourself on parallel bars, lower your body by bending arms, then push back up.

name: Plank
description: Hold a push-up position on forearms, keeping body straight. Hold for time.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: Hang from a bar, raise legs until parallel to the floor or higher.

name: Cable Crunch
description: Kneel in front of a cable machine, crunch down pulling the rope toward the floor.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
description: Kneel and roll an ab wheel forward, extending your body, then pull back to start.
